title: Jared Kreiner
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Jared Kreiner
Snapshot: 2026-07-21

confidence.rationale: Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.
Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.
Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.

biography: Jared Kreiner is excited to return to Christopher Newport University, where he received BAs in History and Classical Studies. He also received MAs in History from Salisbury and Chicago, and his PhD in History from the University of Chicago. At the core of his research, Jared is interested in how Rome interacted with and governed indigenous populations as well as the social and military history of the imperial Roman military. His current book project, Warfare and the Roman Provincial Census in the Age of Augustus , approaches the inauguration and initial spread of the Roman provincial census, a key institution of Roman administration, through the lens of planned or ongoing warfare under Rome's first emperor Augustus.
education_entries: Ph D in History, University of Chicago
MA in History, University of Chicago
BA in Classical Studies, Christopher Newport University
research_interests: Roman Empire (31 BCE - 265 CE); Roman Imperialism; Indigenous Revolts; Roman Provincial Administration; History of Roman Military Units; Social History of Roman Military
teaching_interests: Jared's teaching focuses on indigenous and subaltern populations’ discrepant experiences of ancient Mediterranean and Near Eastern empires/states and Greco-Roman socio-political history. Ancient Rome; Ancient Revolts; Ancient Greece; Latin; Greco-Roman-Byzantine War and Society
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). The Initial Spread of the Provincial Census: Warfare and the Census . Deimos. Volume, 1. Pages, 95-118.
Conference Proceeding (2024). Challenges for Auxilia Veterans in Going Home . Sidestone Press. Volume, 3.
Conference Proceeding (2024). The Impact of the Tacfarinian Revolt Beyond Africa . Cambridge Scholars Press. Pages, 212-226.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). Unit Levies after the Batavian Revolt and the Conquest of Northern Britannia . Britannia. Volume, 54. Pages, 51-74.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Overburdened Gauls: the case of Florus and Sacrovir’s revolt of 21 CE . Journal of Ancient History. Volume, 9. Issue, 1. Pages, 147-184.

Presentations: Jared Kreiner, Warfare in the Ancient World International Conference, "The Initial Spread of the Provincial Census: Warfare and the Census," Chicago, IL. (2024)

Jared Kreiner, The Many Faces of War IX: Invasion, Insurgency, Escape, and Citizens, "Caught Between Rebels and Roman Counter-Insurgency: Provincial Populations and the Batavian Revolt," Sioux Falls, SD. (2024)
Jared Kreiner, LIMES Congress XXV, "Challenges for Auxilia Veterans in Going Home," Nijmegen, The Netherlands. (2022)
